input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>The video displays the back of a person's head with dark hair styled in an intricate updo. The background features a beige wall, a doorway, a brown recliner, and a tall mirror. White text overlay at the bottom initially reads "MOHAWK PULL" and updates to "MOHAWK PULL-THROUGH BRAID" in the second frame. The subject and camera remain stationary throughout.</think><answer></answer>

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] The video displays the back of a person's head with dark hair styled in an intricate updo. White text initially reads "MOHAWK PULL" and updates to "MOHAWK PULL-THROUGH BRAID" before vanishing. The static background features a beige wall, doorway, brown recliner, and tall mirror. [4-14] The scene cuts to a woman facing forward with highlighted dark hair, wearing a black top and layered silver necklaces. She holds a black circular hair tool up near her head, then lowers it out of view. She briefly touches the hair on her right side, looks downward while speaking, and concludes by raising both hands to place her fingers into the hair at the top of her head.

A woman with dark hair, wearing a black top and layered silver necklaces, styles a section of hair at her crown. She lifts the dark hair vertically with her right hand while her left hand secures the base, turning her head to a left profile. She brings both hands to the top of her head to gather and smooth the strands near her scalp, looking forward. She alternates holding the section upright with one hand while touching hair near her left ear, then rejoins both hands at the crown to adjust the base. Her gaze shifts from forward to downward as she focuses on smoothing the hair. She continues to manipulate the gathered section, using both hands to refine the placement near her scalp. Finally, she holds the section vertically with her left hand, turning to her left profile again while her right hand reaches up to adjust the hair near her scalp.

[30-34] A woman in a black top and layered silver necklaces separates gathered dark hair at her crown, holding two sections outward before adjusting them near her scalp while facing forward. [34-38] She lifts a section vertically with her left hand, turns to a left profile, then faces forward to separate a smaller strand near her forehead, looking directly at the camera. [38-42] She manipulates the strand near the top of her head, then secures the gathered crown section with a black clip, smoothing loose hair on the sides. [42-46] Facing left in profile and wearing a silver bracelet, she uses her right hand to smooth the loose dark hair on the side of her head, running her palm upwards along the scalp towards the black clip.

From [46-50], a woman in a black top with a silver bracelet is viewed in left profile, raising her right hand to grasp a section of dark hair at her crown near a black clip. Turning to face forward from [50-54], she holds the gathered dark hair vertically with both hands, adjusting the placement near the top of her head. Between [54-62], she continues facing the camera, using both hands to grip the base of the upright hair section. She appears to secure and tighten a hair tie around the gathered strands, pulling upwards to finalize the high ponytail base while maintaining eye contact.

From 62s to 74s, a woman in a black top faces forward, using both hands at her crown to grip, lift, and tighten the base of a high ponytail. She secures the hair tie around the gathered dark strands while looking at the camera. At 74s, she turns her back to the camera, continuing to adjust the ponytail base with both hands raised. Her long, dark, wavy hair hangs down, and a silver bracelet is visible on her left wrist as she works on the style.

recent_thinks: [78-80] Facing left in profile, the woman keeps her left hand at the crown securing the high ponytail base. Her right hand moves down to grasp the dark, wavy hair near the nape of her neck, smoothing the strands while wearing a black top and silver bracelet.

[80-82] Facing left in profile, the woman keeps her left hand at the crown securing the high ponytail base. Her right hand moves from the nape upwards, gathering the loose dark wavy hair and pulling it back towards the secured section, preparing to integrate it into the style while wearing a black top.

[82-84] Facing away from the camera, the woman uses both hands to gather the remaining loose dark hair at her nape. She twists and holds the strands together, appearing to secure the lower section into a ponytail base while wearing a black top.

[84-86] Facing away from the camera, the woman in a black top holds a section of dark hair at the back of her head with both hands. She twists the gathered strands near the nape of her neck, continuing to secure the lower portion of her hair while wearing silver bracelets on her left wrist.

[86-88] Facing away from the camera, the woman in a black top uses both hands to manipulate a section of dark, wavy hair at the back of her head. She holds the gathered strands near the nape of her neck, twisting and securing the lower portion of her hair while silver bracelets are visible on her left wrist.

[88-90] Facing away from the camera, the woman in a black top twists a section of dark hair at the nape of her neck with both hands. She manipulates the gathered strands, continuing to style the lower portion of her hair while silver bracelets remain visible on her left wrist.

[90-92] Facing away from the camera, the woman in a black top continues to manipulate dark, wavy hair at the back of her head. She uses both hands to twist and pull the strands near the nape of her neck, adjusting the hairstyle while silver bracelets are visible on her left wrist.

queries.question: How many pieces of jewelry are visible on the woman when a black clip secures the top section of her hair?

samples.output: <think>Facing away and slightly left, the woman in a black top adjusts dark wavy hair at the back of her head. Her left hand, wearing silver bracelets, holds the base near the scalp while her right hand grips and pulls a section of hair outward to the right, continuing the styling sequence.</think><answer></answer>
